events.text: Assessed: high/exposed nail placement on the shingle installation fails IRC R905.2.5 and manufacturer nailing-zone requirements — nails above the nail line miss the reinforced strip (reducing wind-uplift resistance) and leave heads uncovered (leak risk). Written to `/app/answer.json` with `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, and corrective actions (remove/re-nail affected shingles, full-field inspection before closeout).
